case_title: MARTELLI RAY VS COST PLUS INC. AKA COST PLUS IMPORTS INC.

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO TONY SMITH FOR COST PLUS RECEIVED.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $649.28 FILED BY MARTELLI RAY AS TO DEFENDANT COST PLUS INC. AKA COST PLUS IMPORTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTELLI RAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COST PLUS INC. AKA COST PLUS IMPORTS INC. $325.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $338.00, PLAINTIFF WAS 50% NEGLIGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
